title: gentiana ochroleuca var. intermedia
intro: Gentiana ochroleuca var. intermedia, also known as the yellow gentian, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Gentiana ochroleuca plant species, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and congestion, due to its bioactive compounds like gentiopicroside and gentianine. The health benefits of Gentiana ochroleuca var. intermedia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
